purpose: Tie the executable neighbor delivery recipient-rejection chain to its chain claim, proof certificate, object language, underlying transition bundles, and source-status boundaries.
positive_example: neighbor c standard signal delivery rejected by recipient
boundaries: This bundle covers only the non-init standard-signal neighbor delivery recipient rejection chain, while init-family and write-buffer consumption chains remain separate.
Recipient standard-signal command messages are rejected rather than executed.
Write-buffer recipient command messages are implemented by ADR-0169 and no longer serve as rejection-chain witnesses.
No scheduler, topology, or multi-cell timing model is claimed.
